name: Pleo Corporate Spending API
what_it_does: Pleo REST API for corporate spending and expense management platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee spending cards, retrieve expense transactions, access receipt data, manage budgets and spend limits, and integrate Pleo spending data with accounting and ERP systems. Pleo provides smart company cards with automated expense reporting for European SMBs.
use_cases: Retrieving employee expense transactions from accounting integration agents
Monitoring spending against budgets from finance operations agents
Syncing expense data with accounting software from finance automation agents
Managing spending limits and card controls from compliance agents
not_for: Enterprise-scale AP automation beyond smart card spending
Consumer personal finance without corporate context
best_when: A European SMB using Pleo wants AI agents to sync spending data with accounting software, monitor budget utilization, and automate expense reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate card spending data is sensitive. Incorrect spend limit configuration can result in unauthorized spending. PCI-DSS compliance required for card data.

auth.notes: Pleo uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow. Scopes for reading and writing different data types. Danish company with EU-native GDPR compliance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Starter: free for up to 3 users
pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Advanced, and Beyond plans per user per month
pricing.notes: Danish company (Copenhagen). European corporate cards and expense management. Developer portal with sandbox. API available on all paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate card spending and budget control data
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2
Danish company — EU-only data residency; GDPR native; not available for US-only requirements
Developer sandbox available for integration testing without real spending
Multi-currency support for European markets — currency handling required
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Corporate card and spending data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. Danish company — EU-only. OAuth2 with scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate card and spending data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. Danish company — EU-only. OAuth2.
